name: Shopify
description: Hosted ecommerce platform offering storefronts, admin, and partner APIs to manage products, orders, customers, checkout, and storefronts.

auth_methods.note: Official docs state OAuth for public apps, access tokens required for Admin API, API key/secret shown in app credentials, and session tokens (JWT) for frontend-backend auth.

credential_access.note: Shopify's official 'Create a Shopify app' guide states you need a Partner account to create an app (via Partner Dashboard or Shopify CLI). Creating an app in the Partner Dashboard provides app credentials (API key/secret) for API access, and Partner accounts/dev tooling are self-serve.

api_surface.note: Official docs list Admin REST and GraphQL APIs and the Storefront (GraphQL) API; wide coverage across products, orders, customers, checkout, webhooks, etc.

buildability.note: Shopify's official 'Getting started' / 'Create a Shopify app' docs indicate you can self-serve by creating a Partner account and creating an app (and using a development store for testing). The Shopify APIs documentation provides immediate access to API docs (Admin/Storefront), enabling building and testing integrations today; some advanced features may still require additional Shopify plan/feature access.

queries: Shopify app authentication OAuth access tokens session tokens site:shopify.dev docs
Create an app Partner Dashboard development store get API credentials shopify.dev
